response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum experience requirement (20 years in software engineering since 2006) and holds a relevant bachelor's degree, with recent exposure to AI infrastructure at Naver through MCP and agentic workflow tooling. However, the resume lacks the specialized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms central to this Principal Engineer strategic role. His background is that of a versatile full-stack engineer transitioning into AI infrastructure rather than a recognized AI architect or strategist with the thought leadership expected for advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems demonstrates sustained technical depth and adaptability to new specializations
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks, showing recent hands-on engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling
Proven ability to lead technical communities and inspire engineers through open source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and teaching workshops
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML—background is generalist computer science rather than specialized AI research or architecture
Resume shows no evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms; recent AI work appears infrastructure/tooling-focused rather than product-strategy-focused
Lacks demonstrated thought leadership or track record advising on AI strategy; missing public recognition as an AI expert or published insights on AI transformation

key_factors.factor: Missing advanced AI degree and demonstrated AI products/platforms
20 years of engineering experience meets and exceeds seniority requirement
Recent AI infrastructure contribution at Naver but too new and infrastructure-focused
